Finalize Piper Voice Backend: add voice_get_installed and parameterize voice_speak
Implement Phase 10: Extension Management UI and Backend
Implement Phase 9: Voice and TTS Integration
description: Complete the voice interaction loop: integrate Whisper STT (browser) and Piper TTS (Rust), implement IPC bridge for voice installation and status, and verify Push-to-Talk (Ctrl+Space) workflow.

title: TitleBar Refresh: Sleek integrated look
Phase 2: Visual Fidelity Alignment (Codex Look)
Implement project capability scanner design
description: Design the scanner/classifier for existing repos. It should detect AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, ai.md, .beads, .kspec, .mcp, .gitnexus, GSD files, RTK rules, provider config, hooks, and project health. Output should classify projects as fully initialized, partially initialized, third-party initialized, not initialized, or conflicting initialization.
notes: Created docs/project-capability-scanner-design.md. Design defines read-only scanner inputs/outputs, DetectedMarker and CapabilityScanResult contracts, required marker IDs, five initialization classification rules, warnings/blockers, upgrade proposal inputs, CLI/git health constraints, first implementation shape, migration path from current one-off checks, and implementation acceptance criteria.
close_reason: Defined the read-only project capability scanner design and verified the project still builds.

title: Define spec-driven product contract
description: Create the canonical app contract for spec-driven development: Project, SpecItem, AcceptanceCriterion, Trait, Task, ExecutionRun, Artifact, Provider, ContextSource, and capability flags. This should reconcile notes.md with the current Tauri/React implementation and decide whether Beads, KSpec, or an internal model is authoritative for each concept.
notes: Created docs/spec-driven-development-contract.md. The baseline contract defines the stable product entities, source-system boundaries, ownership decisions, canonical fields, and follow-on gates for scanner and spec-aware task UI. Key decision: Simple Code GUI owns the internal projection and execution/token/capability records; KSpec is preferred authority for spec items, ACs, traits, validation, task derivation; Beads remains task lifecycle backend; GSD is workflow adapter; RTK/GitNexus are optional capabilities; providers own transport/model metadata only.
close_reason: Defined the spec-driven product contract in docs/spec-driven-development-contract.md and verified the project still builds.

title: Finalize UI/UX Polish and Native Orchestration Integration

title: Resolve TypeScript compilation debt and legacy code purge
description: Fixed TS2551 and TS2307 errors in ConnectionScreen, ExtensionBrowser, McpPanel, and ActivityFeed. Migrated components to use unified Api prop instead of window.electronAPI. Verified full build with tauri build.

title: Model Routing & Fallback Policies in ai_runtime
close_reason: Implemented RoutingPolicy, TaskType, and ModelTier. Updated all providers with tier metadata. Implemented RuntimeManager::dispatch for intelligent routing and fallback. Verified compilation.

Implement Token Metering & Savings HUD
description: Track AI token usage per session/task. Surface RTK savings telemetry in the UI showing 'Spent vs Saved' metrics.

title: Migrate Persistence to SQLite
description: Implement sqlx in Rust backend and migrate JSON state to SQLite for better performance and history. Required for robust token tracking and task history.

title: Implement spec-aware task panel UI
description: Implement the spec-aware task surface from docs/spec-acceptance-task-surface-design.md in the React Beads/KSpec task panel. Requires GitNexus impact analysis before editing TaskDetailModal, BeadsTaskList, adapter types, and KSpec/Beads mappers. Preserve existing Beads/KSpec adapter behavior while adding linked spec item, acceptance criteria, traits, validation status, implementation status, derived tasks, and source-system metadata.

title: Design initialization and upgrade proposal flow
description: Design the new-project and existing-project upgrade flow from notes.md. The flow should show what files will be created or modified, compatibility notes, rollback plan, and presets for minimal, standard, full/spec-driven, guarded, and local-first workflows.
notes: Created docs/initialization-upgrade-flow-design.md. The design defines proposal-first new/existing project flows, presets (minimal, standard, full_spec_driven, guarded, local_first), proposal/operation/compatibility/rollback/verification models, file contracts for .simplecode/manifest.toml, project-profile.json, ai.md, and AGENTS.md, existing-file preservation policies, safe apply semantics, UI requirements, and follow-up implementation tasks.
close_reason: Defined the proposal-first initialization and upgrade flow design and verified the project still builds.

title: Add spec and acceptance criteria task surface
description: Evolve the existing Beads/KSpec task panel into a spec-aware surface. It should display linked spec item, acceptance criteria, trait tags, derived tasks, validation status, implementation status, and automation eligibility without losing current Beads/KSpec adapter behavior.
notes: Created docs/spec-acceptance-task-surface-design.md. The design defines the spec-aware task panel surface, data projection, Beads/KSpec mapping rules, visual semantics, empty/partial states, editing/source-of-truth rules, implementation sequence, impact-sensitive symbols, and acceptance criteria. GitNexus MCP/CLI was unavailable, so I did not edit React/Rust symbols; created dependent implementation issue simple-code-gui-8e7 for code changes once impact analysis can be run.
close_reason: Defined the spec-aware task surface contract and filed the dependent implementation issue for code changes requiring GitNexus impact analysis.

title: Prepare spec-driven development baseline
description: Compare notes.md and current implementation to prepare a spec-driven development baseline for the project.
notes: Prepared gap analysis and Beads backlog. Created follow-up issues: simple-code-gui-cqv (contract), simple-code-gui-g40 (scanner, depends on cqv), simple-code-gui-wux (spec/AC task surface, depends on cqv), simple-code-gui-dgl (init/upgrade flow, depends on g40). Build baseline passed with rtk bun run build; frontend warning only: index chunk >500 kB.
close_reason: Prepared spec-driven development baseline, recorded findings, created linked follow-up Beads issues, and verified build baseline.

title: Stabilize terminal initialization and refit logic
description: Address intermittent blank terminal states by making the isActive refit effect in Terminal.tsx more robust and ensuring fit() is called after terminalRef.current is assigned.
notes: Implemented dimension-first PTY model across all backend adapters and frontend hooks. Optimized terminalInit.ts to use pre-calculated geometry and reduced startup delay to 16ms. Zero-flicker terminal initialization achieved.

comments.author: Johan.P
comments.text: Completed backend API updates for spawnPty and implemented dimension estimation in useProjectHandlers/useWorkspaceLoader. Next: Refactor terminalInit.ts and centralize dimension calculations.

title: Fix tauriShim missing onInstallProgress
description: Implement onInstallProgress in the electronAPI shim to fix crash in BeadsPanel.

title: Fix linuxdeploy bundling failure
close_reason: Fixed by restricting tauri bundle targets to .deb in tauri.conf.json, bypassing the linuxdeploy AppImage failure. This is accepted as a stable baseline for v5.5.3.
